## Checklist

- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`) per the DCO (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] `gofmt`, `go vet ./...` and `go test -race ./...` pass
- [ ] New/changed behavior is covered by tests
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing behavior changed
